transcript.content: 能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the VS Code context-size UI. Keep raw context for the current requirements: user wants a direct visual context-size display from the status bar, auto-updating without manual refresh/commands, brief summary first with click-to-open detailed popup, and a strict boundary that this must be a standalone extension not tied to Project Assistant. Latest turn refines the same task by asking to merge the duplicated displays into one and remove live-panel.md.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active implementation thread, so relation=continue. The latest user turn depends on earlier requirement-setting turns, especially the direct/auto-updating UI requirement and the standalone-extension boundary, so those should remain raw. The Project Assistant explanation turns are resolved background context and good eviction candidates. Earlier status snapshots and superseded 'I already built it' responses are also safe to evict. Semantic pins preserve durable product constraints even if those turns are later compacted.

applied.archiveSummary: Active topic remains the VS Code context-size UI. Keep raw context for the current requirements: user wants a direct visual context-size display from the status bar, auto-updating without manual refresh/commands, brief summary first with click-to-open detailed popup, and a strict boundary that this must be a standalone extension not tied to Project Assistant. Latest turn refines the same task by asking to merge the duplicated displays into one and remove live-panel.md.
